title: Better Crosshair
body:
# Better Crosshair Mod


A highly customizable crosshair mod that makes the vanilla crosshair obsolete.

## FEATURES

- Changes color when facing entities
- Can change which entities trigger color change
- An indicator if you're wearing an elytra
- Customizable crosshair art
- Crosshair art presets
- and more!

## DEPENDENCIES
This mod requires Mod Menu and YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL).

Mod Menu - Version 17.0.0-beta.2 for 1.21.11 Fabric

YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL) - Version 3.8.2 for 1.21.11 Fabric

Discord:
https://discord.gg/Z4qGE4EQCY
